scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:libs && npm run build:engines && npm run build:agents
scripts.build:libs: tsc -p libs/context-schema/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p libs/context-schema/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p libs/context-loader/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p libs/context-loader/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p libs/orchestration/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p libs/orchestration/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p libs/llm-provider/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p libs/llm-provider/tsconfig.lib.json
scripts.build:engines: tsc -p engines/basis/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p engines/basis/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p engines/mind/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p engines/mind/tsconfig.lib.json
scripts.build:agents: tsc -p agents/polymath/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p agents/polymath/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p agents/resonant/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p agents/resonant/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p agents/architect/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p agents/architect/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p agents/executor/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p agents/executor/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p agents/horizon/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p agents/horizon/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc -p agents/alchemist/tsconfig.lib.json && tsc-alias -p agents/alchemist/tsconfig.lib.json
